source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/03_A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW/DHF DMR/10. 설계변경 문서/(A-TCF-5-019-A-040) 2G 1417, DK社 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 및 BOM 변경 件_2024.12.05/설계변경 문서/[설계변경문서]2G 1417, DK社 Deco Sheet 변경 요청 및 BOM 변경 件/A-TCF-5-019-7-A-040 변경영향평가서.xls

sourceSummary.oneLine: Change evaluation for change control number A-TCF-5-019-7-A-040, assessing impacts across design, supplier, manufacturing, process, QC, labeling, documents, customer, regulatory, inventory, and environmental areas.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used to document whether a design change requires follow-up actions such as drawing and BOM distribution, sample fabrication, verification, supplier notification, regulatory reporting, or hazardous substance documentation.
keyPoints: Design output is impacted and requires changed drawing and BOM distribution.
Sample fabrication is required, followed by X-ray imaging of the changed item.
Supplier notification is required by sending and notifying the new supplier.
Regulatory questions for change approval, notification, and agency reporting are marked No.
RoHS hazardous substance certificate need is marked No.
